name: SOT Three-Layer Canonical Contract Chain

citations.evidenceRole: eight-contract primary-disposition source reconciliation (6 ADAPT, 2 NEW_DOC_ONLY)

citations.lineOrSection: Producer/Consumer Packet And Receipt Mapping table

claimBoundary: CONTRACT_ONLY for this entry itself. Documents eight accepted inter-layer contract types (SourceEnvelope, RefineryPacket, KernelEvaluationRequest, KernelDecision, TruthReceipt, TruthReference, DistributionPackage, FeedbackProposal) spanning the SOT three-layer family (Refinery, Truth Kernel, post-Kernel Truth Flow). This entry is the contract authority only and does not itself assert runtime behavior. Bounded local-ready runtime owners for the three layers and their vertical-slice composition are recorded separately as accepted review evidence in cvf.asc.module.sot3_refinery_runtime.v1, cvf.asc.module.sot3_truth_kernel_runtime.v1, cvf.asc.module.sot3_truth_flow_runtime.v1, and cvf.asc.module.sot3_three_layer_slice.v1; none of those module records claims universal activation, provider/live behavior, public export, or production readiness.
boundaryCaveat: This contract entry does not itself claim Refinery, Truth Kernel, or post-Kernel Truth Flow runtime exists; bounded local-ready runtime existence is recorded in the four separate module entries named above, not by editing this contract's own runtime posture. Does not claim TKG-T1 evidence/obligation field reconciliation is complete (deferred to a future TKG-T2-style tranche per T1 CAP-04).
